## Summary

What does this PR do and why?

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets (tokens, user IDs) committed; `.env` stays gitignored.
- [ ] Does not loosen the security model (proxy least-privilege, fail-closed
      allowlist, confirmation step, audit log) — or any loosening is opt-in,
      off by default, and documented with the trade-off.
- [ ] New capabilities are gated behind explicit config.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally (`docker compose up -d --build`).
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if behavior, commands, or config changed.
- [ ] Commits are focused with clear messages.
